description: PreToolUse + UserPromptSubmit + PostToolUse hooks for widget-platform's comparator loop, publish flow, and formula authoring. PreToolUse: (1) publish_widget: hard-blocks style_request_type="updation" passed without generation_id - a static, zero-ambiguity shape that silently downgrades to "addition" server-side and creates a duplicate history entry instead of updating anything (the root cause of a real reported incident). UserPromptSubmit: (2) universal-communicator-formula: when a prompt asks for a widget formula or a universal_widget_communication block, injects an instruction steering the model to the universal-communicator-formula skill instead of hand-writing the JS and reintroducing the cross-engine (Rhino/JSC) runtime bugs that skill exists to prevent. PostToolUse: (3) inspect_screen: uploads the raw device UI tree directly to widget-platform's backend and substitutes a small capture_id in place of the full tree, so the calling model never has to retype a large device tree as a tool-call argument. (4) launch_widget_on_device: generates a real, scannable QR code for the widget's deeplink and saves it to a local file, so the end-of-loop report has a concrete artifact to reference instead of depending on the model remembering to make one. (5) advance_comparator_loop: reinforces the tool's own round_report field with a loud, separate instruction, so the mandatory per-round score/breakdown reporting doesn't silently stay buried in a JSON blob the model reads via jq but never surfaces in chat. (6) publish_widget: when a call actually updated an already-published widget in place, reinforces that fact with a loud reminder to confirm it was intended. Verified live (2026-07-13): updatedToolOutput fully replaces an MCP tool's result before the model sees it.
